# LesVerbes

LesVerbes is a multi-language verb conjugation app suite for French, Greek, Portuguese, Russian, and Catalan.

## Primary URLs

- https://www.lesverb.es/
- https://www.lesverb.es/french/
- https://www.lesverb.es/greek/
- https://www.lesverb.es/portugese/
- https://www.lesverb.es/russian/
- https://www.lesverb.es/catalan/

## SEO Reference Content

- https://www.lesverb.es/reference/
- https://www.lesverb.es/sitemap.xml

## Notes

- Reference pages contain crawlable verb conjugation tables and links back into the interactive app.
- Audio playback on interactive app pages may require browser support for speech or cached TTS assets.
